title: Speaking - Part 4
description: The examiner will ask you some questions related to the topic from Part 3. Give your opinions and discuss with your partner.

content.task: Discussion on the impact of technology on society.

questions.question: Do you think social media has had more positive or negative effects on society overall?
Should children's access to technology and the internet be restricted? Why?

script.text: Do you think social media has had more positive or negative effects on society overall?
Should children's access to technology and the internet be restricted? Why?
Some people say we have become too dependent on technology in our daily lives. To what extent do you agree?
Thank you. That's the end of the speaking test.
